name: codigo_unidade_negocio
description: Business unit code. Synonyms: 'código UN'.

name: codigo_pedido
description: Order primary key. Unique code that identifies the purchase. Useful for counting total orders (COUNT DISTINCT).

name: data_venda
description: Order sales date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Column used for partitioning. Ideal for day, month, and year filters.

name: data_hora_venda
description: Exact date and time of the order sale. Useful for granular peak hour analysis.

name: ciclo
description: Commercial cycle in effect at the time of sale (e.g., 'CICLO 01', 'CICLO 02', 'CICLO 03').

name: ano_ciclo
description: Year corresponding to the commercial cycle of the sale (e.g., 2023, 2024).

name: descricao_ciclo
description: Textual description of the marketing cycle associated with the sale (e.g., 'PAIS', 'MAES', 'NATAL', 'NAMORADOS', 'REGULAR').

name: codigo_produto
description: Unique SKU code of the sold product.

name: codigo_produto_pai
description: Grouping key for kits and product variants.

name: nome_marca
description: Brand name of the sold product.

name: nome_categoria
description: Product category. Synonyms: 'departamento'.

name: produto_combo_kit
description: Boolean flag (TRUE/FALSE) indicating whether the sold product is a promotional combo or kit.

name: estado_uf
description: Federative Unit acronym of the order destination (e.g., 'SP', 'RJ', 'MG').

name: nome_regiao
description: Geographic region of the order destination (e.g., 'SUDESTE', 'NORDESTE', 'SUL').

name: nome_cidade
description: Full name of the order delivery destination city.

name: valor_receita_bruta
description: Total gross amount charged before taxes and returns. Synonyms: 'faturamento bruto', 'GMV'.

name: valor_receita_faturada
description: Net revenue after invoice issuance. Synonyms: 'Receita Net', 'faturamento líquido'.

name: valor_venda_pago
description: Amount effectively paid by the customer in the payment method.

name: valor_venda_desconto
description: Sum of discounts applied to the sold item.

name: status_pedido
description: Updated order status. Expected values include: ('FATURADO','CANCELADO'). Synonyms: 'situação do pedido'.

name: pedido_faturado
description: Flag (TRUE/FALSE) indicating if the order invoice has already been issued.

name: pedido_aprovado
description: Flag (TRUE/FALSE) indicating if the customer's payment was approved.

name: pedido_faturado_aprovado
description: Consolidated flag (TRUE/FALSE). TRUE only if the order was simultaneously approved (payment) and invoiced (invoice issued).

name: nome_canal_venda
description: Channel where the sale was made. Exact possible values: ['APP', 'MARKETPLACE OUT', 'MARKETPLACE GB', 'MARKETPLACE IN', 'SITE']. Synonyms: 'origem do pedido', 'plataforma de compra'.

name: origem_trafego
description: Origin of the web traffic that generated the conversion. If asked about ROI, state that you can only provide the gross/net revenue generated. Common values: ['PAGO', 'NÃO PAGO', 'CRM', 'OUTROS', 'BRAND AWARENESS'].

name: canal_midia
description: Media vehicle or channel that generated the click for the sale. If asked about ROI, state that you can only provide the gross/net revenue generated. Common values: ['GOOGLE', 'FACEBOOK', 'INSTAGRAM'].

name: grupo_canal_midia
description: Media channels grouped into similar categories. Example: Google, Facebook, and Instagram are grouped as 'REDES SOCIAIS' in this field. If asked about ROI, state that you can only provide the gross/net revenue generated. Common values: ['REDES SOCIAIS', 'BUSCADORES DE IA', 'MECANISMOS DE BUSCA'].

name: nome_cupom
description: Voucher or promotional coupon code applied by the customer during the purchase. If asked about ROI, state that you can only provide the gross/net revenue generated.

name: tipo_entrega
description: Delivery method chosen by the customer. Possible values: ['ENTREGA PADRÃO', 'RETIRADO NA LOJA', 'NÃO ENTREGUE']. Synonyms: 'método de envio'.

name: cpf_consumidor_anonimizado
description: Unique customer identifier (anonymized CPF). Useful for calculating the total of unique customers (distinct buyers) using COUNT DISTINCT.
